Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class ForecastingTypeSource

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.ForecastingTypeSource
public class ForecastingTypeSource extends Metadata

Java class for ForecastingTypeSource complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ForecastingTypeSource">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="forecastingSourceDefinition" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="forecastingType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="isProtected" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="masterLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="parentSourceDefinition" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="relationField" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="sourceGroup" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
